Review: Did Frigidaire's engineers design this to fail? They certainly didn't seem to care about how long a ridiculously thin piece of plastic wedged into the door frame would last, or test it for durability. I've had to replace this shelf every two years or so because it cracks and breaks under normal loads.
validation.generated_summary: Does not last long, breaks easily

Review: They fit decently, I bought the biggest they had I think. Tag said 5x. They do not have a gusset which I thought they would. They are long which I like and thin material but somehow HOT! I had to change out of them after getting really sweaty...yes I live in Texas and its summer but I was indoors the entire time I had them on. Over all I don't recommend them. Too hot under clothes for "underwear" and too thin to be shorts... what are they then?! Anyways I do not like them. I will update if they tear soon because of how thin they are. Update: decided to return and not waste $20 on something ill never wear.

Review: [[VIDEOID:f269f4bbb908ea03a9ffb408f24f4cd3]] This Sunsonic electric shaver for men is simple to use. It comes fully charged. To recharge it, you simply plug the cord into a usb charger and into the shaver. It does not provide a very close shave though. If you prefer a close shave, this may not be the best option for you. If you are looking for an inexpensive electric shaver to keep in your car or in your office for emergencies, or if you are looking for one to travel with, this is a good option. The shaver also comes with a pop-up trimmer. Simply push a button on the back of the shaver and a trimmer pops up so that you can shave your neck and around ears. See my video for additional details.

I don't recommend it. 5/26/18

Review: This item isn't pink as the color of the picture. It's an extremely light pink, so light that you can't even see a hint of pink. So that description is inaccurate. I had to use pliers to somewhat straighten out the curve portion just to put it into my nose, in the process I bruised my nose trying to input it. Not a good product. I would have returned it if I hadn't used pliers to fix it. Don't buy this.
